name: psi-llm
description: Monolithic build orchestrator for the psi-llm React + Express app.

scripts.build:client: npm --prefix client ci && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.build:server: rm -rf server/dist && mkdir -p server/dist && cp -r server/helloWorld.js server/package.json server/package-lock.json server/public server/dist/
scripts.build:app: npm run build:client && npm run build:server && cp -r client/dist/. server/dist/
